structural_claim: Non-Abelian gauge theories exhibit asymptotic freedom where interactions weaken at high energies

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Mathematical proof that non-Abelian gauge couplings decrease at high energy
Theoretical derivation of decreasing coupling in strong interactions

supporting_results.result_name: Measurement of the strong coupling constant
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Experimental confirmation of logarithmic decrease of coupling with energy
